id_requirements: RICS Candidate number + valid photo ID; structured interview conducted in person or via video call before RICS-appointed assessors
exam_rules: APC is a competency-based assessment — not a written examination. Candidates submit a Summary of Experience and Case Study, then attend a Final Assessment interview (typically 60 minutes) with an RICS Assessment Panel. No MCQ paper.
renewal_options: MRICS and AssocRICS membership requires 20 hours CPD/year (10 formal, 10 informal) and annual subscription renewal; no formal re-examination

prerequisites.description: Accredited degree; 24 months APC structured training in project management in the built environment

retake_policy.notes: Candidates who fail may be referred (partial pass) or failed; referred candidates may proceed to re-assessment within 6-12 months on the referred competencies only; maximum 4 attempts in total

domains.name: Mandatory Competencies: Ethics; Client Care; Communication; Data Management
Core Competencies: Project Management; Contract Administration; Cost Management; Programme Management
Optional Competencies: Risk Management; Procurement and Tendering; Conflict Avoidance; BIM Management
Case Study: Written case study on a major construction/development project managed

official_study_resources.title: RICS APC Training Seminars and Webinars
